headline: 1 Consumer Stock to Keep an Eye On and 2 We Ignore
summary: Consumer staples are considered safe havens in turbulent markets due to their inelastic demand profiles. But they’re also double-edged swords as they often lag in booming conditions, and this pattern has persisted recently. Over the past six months, the industry has recorded a loss of 3.3%, a far cry from the S&P 500’s 10.3% ascent.

headline: Go Figure: 3 big marketing numbers from May
summary: Kraft Heinz’s marketing payoff, Netflix’s expanded advertising slate and the state of AI readiness are a few important numbers marketers may have missed.
